Headline: News - Multiple State Schools, England
Info: The Department for Education has announced a £2.1m pilot scheme across six councils to convert empty classrooms into community hubs, addressing the surplus of school spaces and the potential closure of 800 primary schools due to falling pupil numbers.

Headline: Merger - St Mary's Prep School, Henley-on-Thames
Info: St Mary's Prep School has closed and will merge with nearby Rupert House from September due to declining pupil numbers, rising energy costs, and the introduction of VAT on private school fees.
